rationale: The citing paper’s note says it "complements prior mindset-sales frameworks" while introducing a decompositional joint sales-search state-space model of intermediate funnel effects, which closely aligns with the cited paper’s core contribution of integrating dynamic intermediate effects (cognition/affect/experience) with advertising-sales response in a Bayesian state-space framework. Given this clear conceptual/methodological overlap and likely foundational role, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
